name: data-client
sub_goals: Provide fetchTeams() returning normalized team metadata (with hardcoded color fallback)
Provide fetchTeamGameResults(teamId, startDate, endDate) returning GameResult[]
Provide fetchRecentResults(days) convenience wrapper used by ui-render to feed trends-engine
Throw DataClientError on network or non-200 failure
Be the only module touching fetch() or statsapi.mlb.com
